title: Hermit Builders Create! [Fabric] 1.18.2
description: A Create focused decorative mod pack inspired by the 2022 Hermitcraft create series.
body:
## Hermit Builders Create! [Fabric] 1.18.2

Hermit Builders Create! is a blend of the Create mod, several decorative/building focused mods, and a few performance improvements.

### Inspired by the 2022 Create Youtube/Streaming series of 5 certain Hermits...

I've attempted to copy the mod pack as the Hermits played it, however I have made departures.  Primarily, I have added Farmer's Delight, and Expanded Drawers.

This is a collection of Fabric mods centered around Create 0.5.

Features may be added, but I'll try to avoid altering world gen.


### List of Primary Mods:
*dependencies excluded
* Chipped
* Chisel & Bits
* Create Fabric
* Decorative Blocks
* Gravestones
* Oh The Biomes You'll Go
* TerraBlender
* theoneprobe-Fabric
* Roughly Enough Items (REI)
* Simple Voice Chat
* Farmer's Delight

### Client Mods:
* Mod Menu
* Better F3
* Bobby
* Logical Zoom
* LambDynamicLights
* Sodium
* Mouse Wheelie
* Freecam (Modrinth Edition)
* Lithium
* Phosphor
